props.text: STEP 1 — CONNECT:  where are this drive's tags?

props.placeholder: folder path — or click folders below to drill in

header.title: Browse — click a [+] folder to open it

config.expression: if(len({view.custom.selectedFolder})>0, "source: " + {view.custom.selectedFolder}, "pick a folder, then Use this folder")

props.text: STEP 2 — VERIFY:  prove the source is live before mapping

config.script:
folder = self.view.custom.selectedFolder or "[default]"
	s = mira_setup.verify_summary(folder)
	self.view.custom.verifyCount = s['count']
	self.view.custom.verifyGood = s['good']
	self.view.custom.verifyBad = s['bad']
	self.view.custom.verifyRan = True

props.text: Click Test data source to scan the folder.

config.expression: if({view.custom.verifyRan}, "Found " + {view.custom.verifyCount} + " tags   —   " + {view.custom.verifyGood} + " good, " + {view.custom.verifyBad} + " bad", "Click Test data source to scan the folder.")

props.text: STEP 3 — MAP:  tap a slot, then pick its tag

config.script:
asset = self.view.params.assetId or "conveyor"
	folder = self.view.custom.selectedFolder or "[default]"
	self.view.custom.status = mira_setup.accept_all_suggestions(asset, folder)

self.view.custom.selRole = "vfd/vfd101/freq"
	self.view.custom.selSearch = ""
	self.view.custom.status = ""
	self.view.custom.selDivisor = mira_setup.slot_divisor("vfd/vfd101/freq", self.view.params.assetId)
	s = mira_setup.suggest_for_role(self.view.custom.selectedFolder or "[default]", "vfd/vfd101/freq")
	self.view.custom.selTag = s

self.view.custom.selRole = "vfd/vfd101/current_a"
	self.view.custom.selSearch = ""
	self.view.custom.status = ""
	self.view.custom.selDivisor = mira_setup.slot_divisor("vfd/vfd101/current_a", self.view.params.assetId)
	s = mira_setup.suggest_for_role(self.view.custom.selectedFolder or "[default]", "vfd/vfd101/current_a")
	self.view.custom.selTag = s

self.view.custom.selRole = "vfd/vfd101/fault_code"
	self.view.custom.selSearch = ""
	self.view.custom.status = ""
	self.view.custom.selDivisor = mira_setup.slot_divisor("vfd/vfd101/fault_code", self.view.params.assetId)
	s = mira_setup.suggest_for_role(self.view.custom.selectedFolder or "[default]", "vfd/vfd101/fault_code")
	self.view.custom.selTag = s

config.expression: if({view.custom.showOptional}, "− Hide optional signals", "+ Add optional signals (15 more)")

props.placeholder: search tag name…  (already filtered to fitting types)

config.expression: if(len({view.custom.selTag})>0, {view.custom.selTag}, "(tap a tag — or a suggestion is pre-filled)")

config.script:
asset = self.view.params.assetId or "conveyor"
	role = self.view.custom.selRole
	tag = self.view.custom.selTag
	div = self.view.custom.selDivisor
	self.view.custom.status = mira_setup.set_role(asset, role, tag, div)
	self.view.custom.selTag = ""

props.text: STEP 4 — SAVE:  review the map and finish

config.expression: if({view.custom.approved}, "☑ Approved for Ask MIRA", "◻ Approve for Ask MIRA")

props.text: Trend + Decode + Anomaly work as soon as you save. Ask MIRA unlocks only when this map is approved.
